title: Squarespace Product
description: Represents a product in the Squarespace merchant catalog. Products can be physical goods, digital downloads, services, or gift cards. Each product has one or more variants with individual pricing and stock settings.

id.description: Unique identifier for the product assigned by Squarespace

type.description: The product type determining available behaviors and required fields

storePageId.description: Identifier of the Squarespace store page where this product is listed

name.description: Display name of the product shown to customers in the store

description.description: HTML description of the product displayed on the product detail page

url.description: Relative URL path to the product page on the merchant site

urlSlug.description: URL-friendly slug used in the product page path

tags.description: List of tags for organizing and filtering products in the catalog

isVisible.description: Whether the product is visible to customers browsing the store

variants.description: List of product variants, each with its own SKU, price, and inventory settings

images.description: List of images associated with the product

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the product was created

modifiedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the product was last modified

ProductVariant.description: A specific variant of a product representing a unique combination of options such as size and color

id.description: Unique identifier for the product variant

sku.description: Stock keeping unit identifier for inventory and order management

stock.description: Stock tracking configuration and current quantity for this variant

attributes.description: Key-value pairs mapping option names to selected values for this variant, such as Size: Large or Color: Blue

VariantPricing.description: Pricing details for a product variant

basePrice.description: Regular selling price for this variant

salePrice.description: Discounted sale price shown when the variant is on sale

onSale.description: Whether this variant is currently on sale at the salePrice

VariantStock.description: Inventory tracking settings and current stock level for a product variant

quantity.description: Current available stock quantity for this variant

unlimited.description: When true, stock tracking is disabled and the variant is always available

backordered.description: Whether the variant is available for purchase on backorder when out of stock

ProductImage.description: An image associated with a product in the Squarespace catalog

id.description: Unique identifier for the product image

url.description: Publicly accessible URL of the stored product image

altText.description: Alternative text description for accessibility and SEO

width.description: Width of the image in pixels

height.description: Height of the image in pixels

Money.description: A monetary value paired with its currency denomination

value.description: Decimal string representation of the monetary amount
